visuals.title: Perceptron Structure
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Introduction to Artificial Neural Networks</text>
  
  <!-- Input Layer -->
  <rect x="50" y="80" width="80" height="180" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Input Layer
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Hidden Layer -->
  <rect x="170" y="80" width="80" height="180" fill="#BBDEFB" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Hidden Layer
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Output Layer -->
  <rect x="290" y="80" width="80" height="180" fill="#64B5F6" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Output Layer
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Input Neurons -->
  <circle cx="90" cy="100" r="12" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="90" cy="140" r="12" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="90" cy="180" r="12" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="90" cy="220" r="12" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <!-- Hidden Neurons -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="100" r="12" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="210" cy="140" r="12" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="210" cy="180" r="12" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="210" cy="220" r="12" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <!-- Output Neurons -->
  <circle cx="330" cy="120" r="12" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="330" cy="160" r="12" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <circle cx="330" cy="200" r="12" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  
  <!-- Connection Lines -->
  <line x1="102" y1="100" x2="198" y2="100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="102" y1="140" x2="198" y2="140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="102" y1="180" x2="198" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="102" y1="220" x2="198" y2="220" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="222" y1="100" x2="318" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="222" y1="140" x2="318" y2="160" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="222" y1="180" x2="318" y2="200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="222" y1="220" x2="318" y2="160" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Key Concepts Labels -->
  <text x="210" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Input Data → Hidden Processing → Output Results
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
